result.stdout:
Tool.AWS.CodeDeploy:
  Create AWS CodeDeploy deployments

Usage:
  Tool.AWS.CodeDeploy [options] [command] [[--] <additional arguments>...]]

Options:
  --application <application>              AWS CodeDeploy application name
  --deployment-group <deployment-group>    Deployment Group Name
  --s3-location <s3-location>              S3 Revision Location
                                           s3://<bucket>/<key>
  --app-path <app-path>                    Local application path to deploy.
                                           Default './'.
  --region <region>                        AWS Region e.g. us-east-1
  --version                                Display version information

Commands:
  status    Get Deployment Status

Additional Arguments:
  Arguments passed to the application that is being run.
